site.title: VRArena Loyalty — Loyalty, Tournaments & Retention for VR Clubs
site.description: Automate cashback, run tournaments, motivate your staff, and retain more customers. The loyalty platform built for VR clubs and LBE venues — localized for every market.

hero.title: Loyalty That Pays for Itself — Without Adding Work
hero.subtitle: Automate cashback and promo codes. Run tournaments that bring adult players back. Motivate your staff with operator leaderboards. One platform, localized for every market.

metrics.sectionTitle: Proven Results from the LBE Industry
metrics.sectionSubtitle: Numbers that leading entertainment venues achieve with gamified loyalty programs.

visits.label: More Frequent Visits
visits.description: Loyalty members visit 2.5 times more often than regular customers

revenue.label: Higher Average Check
revenue.description: Members spend 15% more per visit compared to non-members

share.label: Revenue from Members
share.description: Over half of total revenue comes from loyalty program participants

growth.label: Annual Market Growth
growth.description: Gamification market CAGR — one of the fastest-growing trends in business

features.sectionSubtitle: Everything your VR club needs to automate loyalty, run tournaments, and retain more customers.

customerApp.title: Customer Mobile App
customerApp.description: Auto-cashback, WhatsApp promo codes, tournaments, and a points wallet your customers actually use. Phone-number login — no passwords, no friction.

operatorApp.title: Operator App
operatorApp.description: Staff scan QR codes and apply rewards in seconds. Built-in operator leaderboards reward your team for every customer they invite and retain.

adminPanel.title: Web Admin Panel
adminPanel.description: Analytics on visits, spend, and retention. Manage campaigns, tournaments, and multi-location performance from a single dashboard.

pains.sectionTitle: Built for the Real Pains of VR Club Owners
pains.sectionSubtitle: Every feature comes from real conversations with owners running VR clubs in Russia, Latin America, and Europe. Here's what we actually solve.

automation.title: Zero Manual Data Entry
automation.description: Cashback, promo codes, and reward points are credited automatically. Your staff stops tracking spreadsheets and starts serving customers.

tournaments.title: Tournaments That Retain Adults
tournaments.description: In-app registration, brackets, player rankings, and team finder. Tournaments are the #1 retention driver for the adult segment — and they build community around your venue.

staffMotivation.title: Motivate Your Floor Staff
staffMotivation.description: Operator leaderboards reward the people on your floor for every customer they invite, register, and bring back. Monthly rankings drive real engagement.

families.title: Family-First Segmentation
families.description: Link kids' profiles to parents, track birthdays, and send targeted offers. Kids' birthdays are the core of every VR venue — we built the app around that.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp-First Communication
whatsapp.description: Phone-number login, promo codes delivered via WhatsApp or SMS, and push notifications for tournaments and deals. Built for markets where WhatsApp is the channel.

localization.title: Localized for Your Market
localization.description: Six languages, multi-region backend, and integration-ready for local payment methods (ModoCard, PIX, cash). Legal requirements handled per country — CPF in Brazil, club rules in Argentina.

demo.sectionSubtitle: Explore the interfaces your customers and team will use every day.

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: Four simple steps to transform your venue's customer retention.

steps.title: Configure
steps.description: We set up your loyalty rules, reward tiers, branding, and gamification mechanics tailored to your venue.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: The customer app goes live on App Store and Google Play. Staff gets the operator app.

steps.title: Engage
steps.description: Customers earn points, collect titles, compete on leaderboards, and unlock streak rewards — driving repeat visits.

steps.title: Grow
steps.description: Track performance, discover customer preferences through gamified surveys, and optimize campaigns with data-driven insights.

contact.sectionSubtitle: Get a personalized demo and see how gamified loyalty can transform your business metrics.
contact.name: Your Name

footer.description: VRArena Loyalty is a product of Portal Tech — gamification-powered loyalty solutions for VR and LBE businesses worldwide.

blog.subtitle: Insights on gamification, customer loyalty, and growth strategies for VR & LBE businesses.
